title: markhamia lutea
intro: Markhamia lutea, also known as the Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Bignoniaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Markhamia lutea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive problems, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
